Project.NAME: japan-travel-rag-mcp
Project.keywords: mcp, retrieval, verification, evidence-first, curated-sources, workspace-id, region-pack, source-list-version, postgresql, pgvector, voyageai, telegram, reddit, tabelog, canonical-poi, provisional-poi, hitl
Project.annotation: Сервис является MCP retrieval + verification infrastructure для внешних travel-агентов. Граница v1: индексировать curated public sources, выдавать evidence objects, и предоставлять детерминированные verify primitives. Оркестрация, correctness-решения и финальный ответ остаются у внешнего агента. Изоляция данных: workspace_id + region_pack_id + source_list_version.

M-CONFIG.NAME: Config
M-CONFIG.purpose: Runtime configuration, feature flags, and provider credentials

fn-createLogger.PURPOSE: Create scoped logger with audit fields

M-WORKSPACE-CONTEXT.NAME: WorkspaceContext
M-WORKSPACE-CONTEXT.purpose: Resolve and validate workspace scope for all requests and jobs

fn-resolveWorkspaceContext.PURPOSE: Resolve workspace identity and access scope

M-REGION-PACK-REGISTRY.NAME: RegionPackRegistry
M-REGION-PACK-REGISTRY.purpose: Region pack and source list version registry for curated source configuration

M-SOURCE-POLICY.NAME: SourcePolicy
M-SOURCE-POLICY.purpose: Source policy matrix enforcement, PII redaction, and query abuse blocking

fn-validateSourcePolicy.PURPOSE: Allow/deny source operations by policy matrix

fn-redactPii.PURPOSE: Regex-based PII redaction for ingest content

M-INDEX-STORE.NAME: IndexStore
M-INDEX-STORE.purpose: Scoped storage for chunks, vectors, lexical indexes, and POI entities

fn-embedTexts.PURPOSE: Generate embeddings for chunks and query text

M-RERANK-ADAPTER.NAME: RerankAdapter
M-RERANK-ADAPTER.purpose: Candidate reranking adapter for top-N evidence candidates

M-INGEST-CONNECTORS.NAME: IngestConnectors
M-INGEST-CONNECTORS.purpose: Connector adapters for Telegram, Reddit, Tabelog, and curated web sources

fn-fetchSourceRecords.PURPOSE: Fetch source records for incremental or backfill mode

M-DEDUP-ENGINE.NAME: DedupEngine
M-DEDUP-ENGINE.purpose: Exact and near-dup record deduplication plus URL canonicalization

fn-deduplicateRecords.PURPOSE: Return unique records and duplicate clusters

M-INGEST-PIPELINE.NAME: IngestPipeline
M-INGEST-PIPELINE.purpose: End-to-end ingest pipeline from fetch to indexed chunks with policy enforcement
M-INGEST-PIPELINE.depends: M-INGEST-CONNECTORS, M-DEDUP-ENGINE, M-EMBEDDING-ADAPTER, M-INDEX-STORE, M-SOURCE-POLICY, M-REGION-PACK-REGISTRY, M-WORKSPACE-CONTEXT, M-LOGGER

fn-runIngest.PURPOSE: Run one full ingest pass for source/scope

M-BACKFILL-JOBS.NAME: BackfillJobs
M-BACKFILL-JOBS.purpose: Checkpointed source backfill orchestration and status tracking

fn-startBackfill.PURPOSE: Start source backfill for window and scope

M-QUERY-EXPANDER.NAME: QueryExpander
M-QUERY-EXPANDER.purpose: RU↔EN query expansion for lexical branch and alias normalization hooks

M-RETRIEVAL-ENGINE.NAME: RetrievalEngine
M-RETRIEVAL-ENGINE.purpose: Hybrid lexical+vector retrieval, candidate fusion, dedup, and rerank
M-RETRIEVAL-ENGINE.depends: M-INDEX-STORE, M-EMBEDDING-ADAPTER, M-RERANK-ADAPTER, M-QUERY-EXPANDER, M-REGION-PACK-REGISTRY, M-WORKSPACE-CONTEXT, M-SOURCE-POLICY, M-LOGGER

fn-runRetrieval.PURPOSE: Return ranked retrieval candidates with match signals

M-EVIDENCE-BUILDER.NAME: EvidenceBuilder
M-EVIDENCE-BUILDER.purpose: Deterministic evidence object construction for MCP responses

fn-buildEvidence.PURPOSE: Build evidence payload with citation context

M-PLACE-LOOKUP-ADAPTER.NAME: PlaceLookupAdapter
M-PLACE-LOOKUP-ADAPTER.purpose: Provider lookup layer for Maps and Tabelog place candidates

fn-lookupPlace.PURPOSE: Lookup place candidates from external providers

M-POI-RESOLVER.NAME: PoiResolver
M-POI-RESOLVER.purpose: Lazy canonical/provisional POI graph and deterministic place resolution policy

fn-resolveOrCreatePlace.PURPOSE: Resolve canonical POI or create provisional entry

M-VERIFICATION-ENGINE.NAME: VerificationEngine
M-VERIFICATION-ENGINE.purpose: Deterministic link verification primitives for maps and Tabelog

fn-validateGoogleMapLink.PURPOSE: Validate map link against expected attributes

fn-verifyTabelog.PURPOSE: Validate Tabelog link against expected attributes

M-HITL-QUEUE.NAME: HitlQueue
M-HITL-QUEUE.purpose: Human review queue for uncertain POI resolution outcomes

fn-applyReviewDecision.PURPOSE: Apply reviewer decision and update POI graph

M-SERVER.NAME: McpServerEntry
M-SERVER.purpose: MCP entrypoint that exposes public retrieval/verification tools and internal operational tools
M-SERVER.depends: M-CONFIG, M-WORKSPACE-CONTEXT, M-REGION-PACK-REGISTRY, M-SOURCE-POLICY, M-INGEST-PIPELINE, M-BACKFILL-JOBS, M-EVIDENCE-BUILDER, M-VERIFICATION-ENGINE, M-HITL-QUEUE, M-LOGGER

fn-startServer.PURPOSE: Start MCP transport and register tools

CrossLink.relation: uses runtime config for logger initialization
loads pack configuration under workspace scope
emits region pack and source version logs
emits DB storage and query logs
reads source configuration and versioned source list
applies PII redaction and source policy
uses lexical variants for cross-language retrieval
formats retrieval candidates into stable evidence objects
persists canonical and provisional place entities
uses canonical/provisional resolution for verdict computation
updates POI graph with reviewer decisions
persists review queue and audit records
validates requested region pack and source list version
bootstraps transport and tool-level audit logs
